outputs.description: To set up the mirroring: Enable Fetching incidents
outputs.name: You can enable incident mirroring between Cortex XSOAR incidents and Salesforce V2 corresponding events (available from Cortex XSOAR version 6.0.0).

outputs.description: In the Mirroring Direction integration parameter, select in which direction the incidents should be mirrored:
outputs.name: in your instance configuration.

outputs.description: Description None Turns off incident mirroring.
outputs.name: Option

outputs.description: Any changes in Salesforce V2 events (mirroring incoming fields) will be reflected in Cortex XSOAR incidents. Outgoing Any changes in Cortex XSOAR incidents will be reflected in Salesforce V2 events (outgoing mirrored fields).
outputs.name: Incoming

outputs.description: Changes in Cortex XSOAR incidents and Salesforce V2 events will be reflected in both directions. Optional: You can go to the mirroring tags parameter and select the tags used to mark incident entries to be mirrored. Available tags are: Comment Entry Tag. Optional: Check the
outputs.name: Incoming And Outgoing

outputs.description: integration parameter to close the Cortex XSOAR incident when the corresponding event is closed in Salesforce V2. Newly fetched incidents will be mirrored in the chosen direction. However, this selection does not affect existing incidents. Important Note:
outputs.name: Close Mirrored XSOAR Incident
